heading: Legislative Liaison of the Space Force
label: 9023a Legislative Liaison of the Space Force

children.heading: .—Establishment
children.label: a .—Establishment
children.text: There is a Legislative Liaison of the Space Force.

children.heading: .—Functions
children.label: b .—Functions
children.text: The Legislative Liaison shall perform legislative affairs functions under the direction of the Chief of Space Operations.
